Dead variable diff_text in run_round1 — assigned but never used. No behavioral impact (run_round_n correctly uses diff_text and diff_unavailable). Cosmetic.
_norm_path absolute path edge case: findings with absolute path file field won't match modified_files set. In practice findings use repo-relative paths.

VERIFIED FALSE POSITIVE: SC-10 active==vendor evidence — WRITER_PATH at scripts/gd-codex-bridge-review.py:82 explicitly defaults to vendor/l3-transport/scripts/review-result-writer.sh. The a12d384 comment explains the migration from legacy ~/.claude/scripts/. grep -n WRITER_PATH confirms line 82. result.yaml evidence text was brief but the implementation is correct.

Merge-phase out-of-scope write (tests/gd-review2-output-coverage-smoke.sh) not in controller-report.json jobs[]. Documented in merge-report-wave3.md under '主 agent 越界写入（已记账）'. Audit trail exists but is not in machine-readable controller format.
VERIFIED FALSE POSITIVE: V9 jsonschema exit code — actual test: extra-field input → exit 2 CONTROLLER_REPORT_INVALID; valid input → exit 0 CONTROLLER_REPORT_VALID. Fully fail-closed.

N5 bridge_exit gate verified: BRIDGE_EXIT_NONZERO guard confirmed present in main() with fixture_mode exemption correctly set. Function-level code path exists. End-to-end process-level verification not in evidence (smoke covers FAILED decision path). Non-blocking.
